_comment: Sericia-branded placeholder thumbnails per Medusa product.handle. These point at /public/placeholders/*.svg (deployed with the storefront) — visual grammar matches LuxuryLoader + logo-mark for brand continuity. Replace with real photography URLs when brand photos arrive, then re-run `npm run products:upload-thumbnails` to sync Medusa.
_usage: npm run products:upload-thumbnails  (requires MEDUSA_ADMIN_EMAIL + MEDUSA_ADMIN_PASSWORD env). MUST run AFTER the storefront deploy so the SVG URLs return 200 before Medusa stores the reference.

product-sencha.attribution: Sericia brand placeholder — 茶 Uji sencha

product-miso.attribution: Sericia brand placeholder — 味 shiro miso

product-shiitake.attribution: Sericia brand placeholder — 椎 donko shiitake
